title: Neither God, Nor Master or Husband
original_title: Ni dios, ni patrón, ni marido
overview: In 1896, Virginia Bolten, a well known thirty years old anarchist, arrives in Buenos Aires where she meets her friend Matilda, along with other women working in the mill Volpon Genaro, under the harsh conditions of the time.

trailers.title: NI DIOS, NI PATRON, NI MARIDO - TRAILER
